issue.title: AdGuard filter bug, with youtube.
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard Browser Extension, Other ad blocker

### AdGuard version

latest

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Firefox

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://youtube.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

Send Do-Not-Track signals

### Add your comment and screenshots

The issue is with AdGuard - Ads, or Mobile Ads, every time, either one is enabled, it prevents youtube from running whatsoever, no results (search broken), no homepage loading, also doesn't work, video playback broken, tried with uBlock Origin with AdGuard filters enabled, broken entirely, 
I even attempted the AdGuard extension by itself, is non functional. AdGuard Mobile Ads or Ads off, is fully functional, no other AdGuard filter lists seem affected by it.

https://ufile.io/h1c9v3li
https://ufile.io/f/xl09a

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body: The issue returned, with Ads filter, it was fixed, mobile ads isn't a problem anymore, uhhh??

comment.body:
Regarding your screenshot, the selector is correct, but there seems to be a problem with the `:contains` expression, even though it uses the same string `Please disable your ad blocker`.

 How about just adding the new rule below to your custom rule list temporarily? If you're okay with that.

```adblock
peacocktv.com##.notification--info
```

comment.body:
I see now. This wasn't the correct approach to handling the rules. These aren't subscription elements, and each rule already had valid categories before I made changes. I verified this by double-checking each site today.

Sorry for the delay in understanding this issue. I wasn't aware of this checklist when merging into a single rule. I will carefully review it when considering this case.

I applied your feedback on the 4bda5ea8340 commit. Please review it.

issue.title: collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com — False positive in AdGuard DNS
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS (public, 94.140.14.14)

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

the problem is with app, not a site

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

`collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com` is a production API endpoint for **PhishingEyes** — a licensed anti-phishing and fraud detection SDK integrated into banking mobile apps (Android). It is used by **Shinhan Bank (SHB)** in South Korea.

The SDK detects spy apps, remote control abuse, and system fraud on end-user devices. This endpoint receives security telemetry from the SDK — it is not an advertising tracker, analytics collector, or spyware server.

The domain is explicitly listed in `SpywareFilter/sections/tracking_servers_firstparty.txt`:
```
||collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com^
```

Blocking this domain prevents the SDK from reporting security threats to the bank's backend, directly impacting fraud protection for banking customers.

**Verified**: All other major filtering DNS providers (Quad9, Cloudflare Families, OpenDNS, CleanBrowsing, Yandex Safe, Control D, Comodo Secure) resolve this domain normally. Only AdGuard DNS blocks it.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.title: collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com — False positive in AdGuard DNS
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS (public, 94.140.14.14)

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

the problem is with app, not a site

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

`collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com` is a production API endpoint for **PhishingEyes** — a licensed anti-phishing and fraud detection SDK integrated into banking mobile apps (Android). It is used by **Shinhan Bank (SHB)** in South Korea.

The SDK detects spy apps, remote control abuse, and system fraud on end-user devices. This endpoint receives security telemetry from the SDK — it is not an advertising tracker, analytics collector, or spyware server.

The domain is explicitly listed in `SpywareFilter/sections/tracking_servers_firstparty.txt`:
```
||collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com^
```

Blocking this domain prevents the SDK from reporting security threats to the bank's backend, directly impacting fraud protection for banking customers.

**Verified**: All other major filtering DNS providers (Quad9, Cloudflare Families, OpenDNS, CleanBrowsing, Yandex Safe, Control D, Comodo Secure) resolve this domain normally. Only AdGuard DNS blocks it.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
Please exclude the domains below from the filter list (blocking filters).

Requested domains:

- verify.shb-pelib.com
- api-ch01.shb-pelib.com
- config-ch01.shb-pelib.com
- api-ch02.shb-pelib.com
- config-ch02.shb-pelib.com

This is a proactive request to reduce the risk of false positives or unintended blocking in the future.

Thank you.

issue.title: outlookindia.com
issue.body:
### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard Browser Extension ### AdGuard version 5.4.3.24 ### What type of problem have you encountered? Missed ads or ad leftovers ### Which browser(s) do you use? Chrome ### Which device do you use? Desktop ### Where is the problem encountered? https://outlookindia.com/xhub/e-gaming/한국-토토사이트-순위-추천 ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter ### Privacy _No response_ ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security _No response_ ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. Korean casino/gambling ads are not blocked on outlookindia.com even with AdGuard Base filter enabled. Ad sources identified via DevTools: (1) Third-party widget network — `widget.revtrixjs.com` - CSS asset `AdLabel.jRqGvbDn.css` loaded with status 200 OK - Serves rotating 3D cube banner (fixed position, bottom-left) and sidebar widgets (2) Inline banner ads — `ads-banner.s3.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com` - Images embedded directly in page HTML - Identified `data-placement-id` values: `BRANDPROMOBANNER`, `HEADERBANNER`, `TOWER2`, `CUBE` - Also includes a modal popup overlay (`id="fxd-s"`) 2. Screenshots
Screenshot 1: Ads visible with AdGuard enabled
Screenshot 2: Ads blocked after applying user rules
### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.title: Upd #231817 zaxid.net video ad wrapper
issue.body:
## Prerequisites ### To avoid invalid pull requests, please check and confirm following terms - [x] This is not an ad/bug report; - [x] My code follows the [guidelines](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [syntax](https://kb.adguard.com/general/how-to-create-your-own-ad-filters) of this project; - [x] I have performed a self-review of my own changes; - [x] My changes do not break web sites, apps and files structure. ## What problem does the pull request fix? ### If the problem does not fall under any category that is listed here, please write a comment below in corresponding section - [x] Missed ads or ad leftovers; - [ ] Website or app doesn't work properly; - [ ] AdGuard gets detected on a website; - [ ] Missed analytics or tracker; - [ ] Social media buttons — share, like, tweet, etc; - [ ] Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc; - [ ] Filters maintenance. ## What issue is being fixed? ### Enter the issue addres Upd https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/231817 ### Add your comment and screenshots Addresses the first (Ads) report from #231817. After the video ad is blocked, an empty "ВІДЕО ДНЯ" container remains on article pages. The existing rule: football24.ua,zaxid.net##div[id^="videoAdvWrapper"] no longer matches zaxid.net because the site now uses desktopVideoAdvWrapper and mobileVideoAdvWrapper IDs. Added a rule targeting .video-adv-wrapper, which is used by both variants. While checking this, I also noticed that the old shared rule appears to be obsolete for football24.ua after the site's redesign. I left it unchanged to keep this PR focused. Issue #231817 contains multiple reports. The annoyance report is handled in a separate [PR](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/compare/master...tpqls774:fix/231817-zaxid.net-video-adv?expand=1).
Screenshots Before: After:
### Terms - [x] By submitting this issue, I agree that pull request does not contain private info and all conditions are met

comment.body: This overlaps with [#232213](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/pull/232213) which was opened earlier and covers the same fix. Closing this in favor of that PR.

comment.body:
Not reproduced with AdGuard and Polish filters on my end.

Please try following actions, then check the problem again:
1. Leave only AdGuard and Polish filters
2.  Disable all content blockers in Safari settings and enable them again
3. Restart Safari
4. Restart AdGuard
5. Check for filters update in AdGuard.

### Important:
<!-- **AdGuard for Safari** -->
* The filters update process is fully completed ~10 seconds after the manual filter update check is completed.

review.body:
Add as `zonatmo.to,zonatmo.*` and add zonatmo.to to watchers.yml (see https://github.com/Alex-302/RotatingDomainsChecker)
so zonatmo.* will work in adblockers with wildcart TLD support, zonatmo.to will be monitored by the script, and rules will be autoupdated (you can check PRs, created by RotatingDomainsChecker).

Add as `zonatmo.to,zonatmo.*` and add zonatmo.to to watchers.yml (see https://github.com/Alex-302/RotatingDomainsChecker)
so zonatmo.* will work in adblockers with wildcart TLD support, zonatmo.to will be monitored by the script, and rules will be autoupdated (you can check PRs, created by RotatingDomainsChecker).

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.body:
# Creating the pull request > Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed\ > If the related issue does not exist in our repository, please create it before making pull request\ > It is highly recommended to use our [Web Reporting Tool](https://kb.adguard.com/technical-support/reporting-tool) instead of creating an issue on GitHub directly\ > Please note, that we verify every pull request manually, so it may take time to apply it ## Prerequisites ### To avoid invalid pull requests, please check and confirm following terms - [x] This is not an ad/bug report; - [x] My code follows the [guidelines](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [syntax](https://kb.adguard.com/general/how-to-create-your-own-ad-filters) of this project; - [x] I have performed a self-review of my own changes; - [x] My changes do not break web sites, apps and files structure. ## What problem does the pull request fix? ### If the problem does not fall under any category that is listed here, please write a comment below in corresponding section - [x] Missed ads or ad leftovers; - [ ] Website or app doesn't work properly; - [ ] AdGuard gets detected on a website; - [ ] Missed analytics or tracker; - [ ] Social media buttons — share, like, tweet, etc; - [ ] Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc; - [ ] Filters maintenance. ## What issue is being fixed? ### Enter the issue address Fix https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/232217 ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. Your comment Korean casino/gambling ads not blocked on outlookindia.com despite AdGuard Base filter being enabled. Ad sources identified via DevTools: (1) Third-party widget network — widget.revtrixjs.com - CSS asset AdLabel.jRqGvbDn.css loaded with status 200 OK - Serves rotating 3D cube banner (fixed position, bottom-left) and sidebar widgets (2) Inline banner ads — ads-banner.s3.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com - Images embedded directly in page HTML - Identified data-placement-id values: BRANDPROMOBANNER, HEADERBANNER, TOWER2, CUBE - Also includes a modal popup overlay (id="fxd-s") 2. Screenshots
Screenshot 1: Ads visible with AdGuard enabled
Screenshot 2: Ads blocked after applying user rules
### Terms - [x] By submitting this issue, I agree that pull request does not contain private info and all conditions are met

```suggestion
korrespondent.net###sidebar_informer_dengi
```
why not just this? Complex selectors can be used to prevent potential breakage in cases of ambiguous layout. In this case, the element ID speaks for itself. At least for me, "dengi" means "money" :) (exchange.informer.ua - news exchange network)

comment.body:
That issue with slow loading seems to be caused by combination of scriptlet and AdGuard Extra.
@Alex-302 Could you please take a look?
On my end it's caused by this rule:
```adblock
zaxid.net,kurs.com.ru,isport.ua,24tv.ua,ria-m.tv,allboxing.ru#%#//scriptlet("abort-current-inline-script", "String.fromCharCode", "!function()")
```
I'm not able to find a script with `!function()` on these websites, so if you still can reproduce it, then could you please check if something else than `String.fromCharCode` could be used?
If it's obsolete then removing this rule should fixes it.
The problem seems to be that aborting `String.fromCharCode` in any way causes slow loading on any website with AdGuard Mini, due to the way how AdGuard Extra is injected. The same may happens on other platforms when `String.prototype.charAt` is aborted.

korrespondent.net##.unit-side-banner
```
can be used here. Or did you see breakages by it?
Btw the site is Ukrainian (not common for ex-USSR, like pirate online cinemas, which visited in both countries), add only to Ukrainian filter.
Strange, I saw that.
Check it with the European IP on your end, for instance, German. You'll see it without the AdGuard Cookie Notices.

issue.title: update #232217 outlookindia.com
issue.body:
# Creating the pull request > Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed\ > If the related issue does not exist in our repository, please create it before making pull request\ > It is highly recommended to use our [Web Reporting Tool](https://kb.adguard.com/technical-support/reporting-tool) instead of creating an issue on GitHub directly\ > Please note, that we verify every pull request manually, so it may take time to apply it ## Prerequisites ### To avoid invalid pull requests, please check and confirm following terms - [x] This is not an ad/bug report; - [x] My code follows the [guidelines](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [syntax](https://kb.adguard.com/general/how-to-create-your-own-ad-filters) of this project; - [x] I have performed a self-review of my own changes; - [x] My changes do not break web sites, apps and files structure. ## What problem does the pull request fix? ### If the problem does not fall under any category that is listed here, please write a comment below in corresponding section - [x] Missed ads or ad leftovers; - [ ] Website or app doesn't work properly; - [ ] AdGuard gets detected on a website; - [ ] Missed analytics or tracker; - [ ] Social media buttons — share, like, tweet, etc; - [ ] Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc; - [ ] Filters maintenance. ## What issue is being fixed? ### Enter the issue address Fix https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/232217 ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. Your comment Korean casino/gambling ads not blocked on outlookindia.com despite AdGuard Base filter being enabled. Ad sources identified via DevTools: (1) Third-party widget network — widget.revtrixjs.com - CSS asset AdLabel.jRqGvbDn.css loaded with status 200 OK - Serves rotating 3D cube banner (fixed position, bottom-left) and sidebar widgets (2) Inline banner ads — ads-banner.s3.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com - Images embedded directly in page HTML - Identified data-placement-id values: BRANDPROMOBANNER, HEADERBANNER, TOWER2, CUBE - Also includes a modal popup overlay (id="fxd-s") 2. Screenshots
Screenshot 1: Ads visible with AdGuard enabled
Screenshot 2: Ads blocked after applying user rules
### Terms - [x] By submitting this issue, I agree that pull request does not contain private info and all conditions are met

this `div` tag at the beginning of the rule is not required. As I see, `.first-rotation-banner` is only for this element, so you can use it.
```suggestion
uatv.ua##.first-rotation-banner
```

> CSS Selector 기준으로 다음과 같습니다만 이에 국한되지 않습니다:
> 
> ```css
> #banner-cube-pe
> .ads-box
> a[rel="sponsored nofollow"]
> ```

감사합니다. 누락된 선택자를 확인했습니다.
확인해보니 기존 규칙은 특정 속성 패턴 위주로 다른 형태의 광고 요소를 놓치고 있었습니다.
말씀해 주신 아래 3가지 선택자를 추가하여 PR을 업데이트하겠습니다.

```
#banner-cube-pe
.ads-box
a[rel="sponsored nofollow"]
```

추가로 누락된 요소가 더 있는지도 다시 확인해보겠습니다.
Ok, I will revert this. Also, on my side, this cookie notice wasn't showing.

The same ad leftovers have two types of dom structures. So, I design the rule without specific child level `>` 

```css
.unit-side-banner > div[id^="zone_"]:has(> div > iframe[src^="https://um1.cdn.umh.ua/uploads/media/"])
.unit-side-banner > div[id^="zone_"]:has(> iframe[src^="https://um1.cdn.umh.ua/uploads/media/"])
```

issue.body:
# Creating the pull request > Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed\ > If the related issue does not exist in our repository, please create it before making pull request\ > It is highly recommended to use our [Web Reporting Tool](https://kb.adguard.com/technical-support/reporting-tool) instead of creating an issue on GitHub directly\ > Please note, that we verify every pull request manually, so it may take time to apply it ## Prerequisites ### To avoid invalid pull requests, please check and confirm following terms - [x] This is not an ad/bug report; - [x] My code follows the [guidelines](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [syntax](https://kb.adguard.com/general/how-to-create-your-own-ad-filters) of this project; - [x] I have performed a self-review of my own changes; - [x] My changes do not break web sites, apps and files structure. ## What problem does the pull request fix? ### If the problem does not fall under any category that is listed here, please write a comment below in corresponding section - [x] Missed ads or ad leftovers; - [ ] Website or app doesn't work properly; - [ ] AdGuard gets detected on a website; - [ ] Missed analytics or tracker; - [ ] Social media buttons — share, like, tweet, etc; - [ ] Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc; - [ ] Filters maintenance. ## What issue is being fixed? ### Enter the issue address Fix https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/232217 ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. Your comment Korean casino/gambling ads not blocked on outlookindia.com despite AdGuard Base filter being enabled. Ad sources identified via DevTools: (1) Third-party widget network — widget.revtrixjs.com - CSS asset AdLabel.jRqGvbDn.css loaded with status 200 OK - Serves rotating 3D cube banner (fixed position, bottom-left) and sidebar widgets (2) Inline banner ads — ads-banner.s3.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com - Images embedded directly in page HTML - Identified data-placement-id values: BRANDPROMOBANNER, HEADERBANNER, TOWER2, CUBE - Also includes a modal popup overlay (id="fxd-s") 2. Screenshots
Screenshot 1: Ads visible with AdGuard enabled
Screenshot 2: Ads blocked after applying user rules
### Terms - [x] By submitting this issue, I agree that pull request does not contain private info and all conditions are met

CSS Selector 기준으로 다음과 같습니다만 이에 국한되지 않습니다:
```css
#banner-cube-pe
.ads-box
a[rel="sponsored nofollow"]
```

issue.title: www.epicgardening.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: update #232217 outlookindia.com
issue.body:
# Creating the pull request > Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed\ > If the related issue does not exist in our repository, please create it before making pull request\ > It is highly recommended to use our [Web Reporting Tool](https://kb.adguard.com/technical-support/reporting-tool) instead of creating an issue on GitHub directly\ > Please note, that we verify every pull request manually, so it may take time to apply it ## Prerequisites ### To avoid invalid pull requests, please check and confirm following terms - [x] This is not an ad/bug report; - [x] My code follows the [guidelines](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [syntax](https://kb.adguard.com/general/how-to-create-your-own-ad-filters) of this project; - [x] I have performed a self-review of my own changes; - [x] My changes do not break web sites, apps and files structure. ## What problem does the pull request fix? ### If the problem does not fall under any category that is listed here, please write a comment below in corresponding section - [x] Missed ads or ad leftovers; - [ ] Website or app doesn't work properly; - [ ] AdGuard gets detected on a website; - [ ] Missed analytics or tracker; - [ ] Social media buttons — share, like, tweet, etc; - [ ] Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc; - [ ] Filters maintenance. ## What issue is being fixed? ### Enter the issue address Fix https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/232217 ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. Your comment Korean casino/gambling ads not blocked on outlookindia.com despite AdGuard Base filter being enabled. Ad sources identified via DevTools: (1) Third-party widget network — widget.revtrixjs.com - CSS asset AdLabel.jRqGvbDn.css loaded with status 200 OK - Serves rotating 3D cube banner (fixed position, bottom-left) and sidebar widgets (2) Inline banner ads — ads-banner.s3.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com - Images embedded directly in page HTML - Identified data-placement-id values: BRANDPROMOBANNER, HEADERBANNER, TOWER2, CUBE - Also includes a modal popup overlay (id="fxd-s") 2. Screenshots
Screenshot 1: Ads visible with AdGuard enabled
Screenshot 2: Ads blocked after applying user rules
### Terms - [x] By submitting this issue, I agree that pull request does not contain private info and all conditions are met

issue.title: www.sankei.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
The script will be removed out of the DOM in apps like AG Windows so we should not use `script` tag in the rules.

How about

```adblock
usehentai.com##div.absolute.inset-0.z-50:has(> div.group\/ad)
```

---

`##div:has()` is quite generic, you can specify the elements more specifically, for example

```adblock
usehentai.com##.grid > .group.border:has(ins)
usehentai.com##.glass-card + div.w-full:has(ins)
usehentai.com##div.z-0:has(> div.w-full > div.border > ins)
```

# Creating the pull request > Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed\ > If the related issue does not exist in our repository, please create it before making pull request\ > It is highly recommended to use our [Web Reporting Tool](https://kb.adguard.com/technical-support/reporting-tool) instead of creating an issue on GitHub directly\ > Please note, that we verify every pull request manually, so it may take time to apply it ## Prerequisites ### To avoid invalid pull requests, please check and confirm following terms - [x] This is not an ad/bug report; - [x] My code follows the [guidelines](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [syntax](https://kb.adguard.com/general/how-to-create-your-own-ad-filters) of this project; - [x] I have performed a self-review of my own changes; - [x] My changes do not break web sites, apps and files structure. ## What problem does the pull request fix? ### If the problem does not fall under any category that is listed here, please write a comment below in corresponding section - [x] Missed ads or ad leftovers; - [ ] Website or app doesn't work properly; - [ ] AdGuard gets detected on a website; - [ ] Missed analytics or tracker; - [ ] Social media buttons — share, like, tweet, etc; - [ ] Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc; - [ ] Filters maintenance. ## What issue is being fixed? ### Enter the issue address Fix https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/232217 ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. Your comment Korean casino/gambling ads not blocked on outlookindia.com despite AdGuard Base filter being enabled. Ad sources identified via DevTools: (1) Third-party widget network — widget.revtrixjs.com - CSS asset AdLabel.jRqGvbDn.css loaded with status 200 OK - Serves rotating 3D cube banner (fixed position, bottom-left) and sidebar widgets (2) Inline banner ads — ads-banner.s3.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com - Images embedded directly in page HTML - Identified data-placement-id values: BRANDPROMOBANNER, HEADERBANNER, TOWER2, CUBE - Also includes a modal popup overlay (id="fxd-s") 2. Screenshots
Screenshot 1: Ads visible with AdGuard enabled
Screenshot 2: Ads blocked after applying user rules
### Terms - [x] By submitting this issue, I agree that pull request does not contain private info and all conditions are met

comment.body:
> 아 맞다. ads-banner.s3.sp-south-1.amazonaws.com를 adservers_firstparty.txt으로 이동시켜 주세요

말씀해주신 S3 도메인 규칙을 adservers_firstparty.txt로 이동하여 PR 업데이트했습니다.
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/pull/232221/commits/6dd8ff2f937ece781d8666f2335b271bf9c340da

review.body:
`BaseFilter/sections/adservers_firstparty.txt`에 추가하신 거는 최상단의 적절한 섹션에 추가해주세요.
`||widget.revtrixjs.com^` 역시도요.

comment.diff_hunk:
@@ -4,15 +4,16 @@
 ! Good: example.org###rek; ||example.com/ads/
 ! Bad: example.org#@##banner_ad (for instance, should be in allowlist.txt or in antiadblock.txt)
 !
+! https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/232009
+||autoportal.ua/banner_app^
+autoportal.ua##.vertical__banner
+autoportal.ua##.horizontal__banner
comment.body:
One cosmetic rule is enough. Also the request has this path`/banner_app/`.
As I see, the website also supports Russian, so it's better to move below rules to CyrillicFilters - common-sections - specific.txt under `! NOTE: Specific rules`.
```adblock
||autoportal.ua/banner_app/
autoportal.ua##div[class*="_banner"]
```

comment.body:
> Regarding your screenshot, the selector is correct, but there seems to be a problem with the `:contains` expression, even though it uses the same string `Please disable your ad blocker`.
> 
> How about just adding the new rule below to your custom rule list temporarily? If you're okay with that.
> 
> ```
> peacocktv.com##.notification--info
> ```


@mu-hun that works perfectly. there is also a new annoyance as well https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/230984#issuecomment-4535073111

issue.body:
## Prerequisites - [x] This is not an ad/bug report; - [x] My code follows the guidelines and syntax of this project; - [x] I have performed a self-review of my own changes; - [x] My changes do not break web sites, apps and files structure. ## What problem does the pull request fix? - [ ] Missed ads or ad leftovers; - [ ] Website or app doesn't work properly; - [ ] AdGuard gets detected on a website; - [ ] Missed analytics or tracker; - [ ] Social media buttons — share, like, tweet, etc; - [x] Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc; - [ ] Filters maintenance. ## What issue is being fixed? Fix ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. Your comment Hides the newsletter subscription form ("Andaç'a abone olun") at the bottom of medyascope.tv pages. The form is built with Elementor and was not covered by existing filters. Rule added to `TurkishFilter/sections/specific.txt`: `medyascope.tv##.elementor-element-6a5fbe4d` Tested in Firefox with uBlock Origin 1.71.0. 2. Screenshots
Screenshot 1 (Before): -->
Screenshot 2 (After): -->

comment.body:
> Ads on my end are blocked (apps, extensions mv2 and mv3, Safari)
> 
> The lang selector is broken because ads are blocked. Please test: `play.hbomax.com#@%#//scriptlet('xml-prune', 'xpath(//*[name()="MPD"]/@mediaPresentationDuration | //*[name()="Period"]/@start | //*[name()="Period"][not(.//*[name()="SegmentTimeline"] or .//*[name()="ContentProtection"])] | //*[name()="Period"][./*[name()="BaseURL"]][not(.//*[name()="ContentProtection"])])', '', '.mpd')`
> 
> [@jo2dan94](https://github.com/jo2dan94) This rule also applied to Discovery. Do you have an ability to check for ads there with this exclusion? `play.discoveryplus.com,play.hbomax.com,play.max.com#%#//scriptlet('xml-prune', 'xpath(//*[name()="MPD"]/@mediaPresentationDuration | //*[name()="Period"]/@start | //*[name()="Period"][not(.//*[name()="SegmentTimeline"] or .//*[name()="ContentProtection"])] | //*[name()="Period"][./*[name()="BaseURL"]][not(.//*[name()="ContentProtection"])])', '', '.mpd')`

spanish subs seem to work on hbo max. i can test discovery plus friday
Just move `football24.ua,zaxid.net##div[id^="videoAdvWrapper"]` Both sites are Ukrainian.

Please check with default settings, user rules disabled and AdGuard – Ads filter enabled.
If issue still occurs, please open uBlock logger and disable rules from AdGuard – Ads filter on by one, and check which one(s) causes it.

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.body:
### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard Browser Extension ### AdGuard version 5.4.3.24 ### What type of problem have you encountered? Missed ads or ad leftovers ### Which browser(s) do you use? Chrome ### Which device do you use? Desktop ### Where is the problem encountered? https://outlookindia.com/xhub/e-gaming/한국-토토사이트-순위-추천 ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter ### Privacy _No response_ ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security _No response_ ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. Korean casino/gambling ads are not blocked on outlookindia.com even with AdGuard Base filter enabled. Ad sources identified via DevTools: (1) Third-party widget network — `widget.revtrixjs.com` - CSS asset `AdLabel.jRqGvbDn.css` loaded with status 200 OK - Serves rotating 3D cube banner (fixed position, bottom-left) and sidebar widgets (2) Inline banner ads — `ads-banner.s3.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com` - Images embedded directly in page HTML - Identified `data-placement-id` values: `BRANDPROMOBANNER`, `HEADERBANNER`, `TOWER2`, `CUBE` - Also includes a modal popup overlay (`id="fxd-s"`) 2. Screenshots
Screenshot 1: Ads visible with AdGuard enabled
Screenshot 2: Ads blocked after applying user rules
### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
One rule could cover both banners:

```suggestion
zaxid.net##.video-adv-wrapper
```

We add rules, which only for ads io mobile versions of sites, in Mobile Ads filter. In tris case `zaxid.net##.video-adv-wrapper` will be applied on both versions using Ukrainian filter.

issue.title: ballotpedia.org

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
When DNS Server is set to Adguard DNS Non-Filtering and DNS Filters is enabled for Adguard DNS Filter.
Unblocking the api3.branch.io domain solves the problem. 

If I switch the DNS Server back to Adguard DNS (that blocks ads and trackers) the problem returns.

I see the video plays there. You can also add this rule or your own to block it. As I see, it doesn't apply on the live stream page.
```adblock
||public.cdn-*.cosmonova.net.ua/mobile-app/main/FreeDom/master.m3u8$domain=uatv.ua
```

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

Ads on my end are blocked (apps, extensions mv2 and mv3, Safari)

The lang selector is broken because ads are blocked.
Please test:
`play.hbomax.com#@%#//scriptlet('xml-prune', 'xpath(//*[name()="MPD"]/@mediaPresentationDuration | //*[name()="Period"]/@start | //*[name()="Period"][not(.//*[name()="SegmentTimeline"] or .//*[name()="ContentProtection"])] | //*[name()="Period"][./*[name()="BaseURL"]][not(.//*[name()="ContentProtection"])])', '', '.mpd')`

@jo2dan94 This rule also applied to Discovery. Do you have an ability to check for ads there with this exclusion?
`play.discoveryplus.com,play.hbomax.com,play.max.com#%#//scriptlet('xml-prune', 'xpath(//*[name()="MPD"]/@mediaPresentationDuration | //*[name()="Period"]/@start | //*[name()="Period"][not(.//*[name()="SegmentTimeline"] or .//*[name()="ContentProtection"])] | //*[name()="Period"][./*[name()="BaseURL"]][not(.//*[name()="ContentProtection"])])', '', '.mpd')`
